2022-23 Murray State Racers Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 17-15 (11-9, 7th in MVC MBB)

Coach: Steve Prohm

PS/G: 70.4 (203rd of 363)

PA/G: 72.0 (240th of 363)

SRS: -4.45 (224th of 363)

SOS: -1.61 (179th of 363)

ORtg: 104.0 (189th of 363)

DRtg: 106.4 (298th of 363)

Preseason Odds: Championship +15000
